name: Sprocket
description: Sprocket is a goldling with red hair, featureless white eyes, and red lips. She wears blue and gold armor with a brown long sleeved shirt and pants underneath. She has blue mechanic goggles with green lenses on her head. She also wields a wrench.
biography: Sprocket was raised with all the privileges of a rich, proper Goldling. But she cared little for fancy things. Instead, she spent most of her time growing up in her uncle's workshop, learning how to build and fix his many mechanical inventions. But everything changed on the day her uncle mysteriously vanished. When she eventually discovered that Kaos had been behind his disappearance, she constructed a battle suit and went after him, leaving the luxury and comfort of her family's wealth behind. From that moment on, Sprocket was dedicated to fighting the forces of evil, whilst never losing hope that she would reunite with her beloved uncle.
personality: Resourceful, Sprocket isn't one to sit back and let others do the work. She jumps in with both armored feet, creating solutions for every problem imaginable.

story.content: All Goldlings are fabulously wealthy, and Sprocket is no exception. Despite being raised by a rich family though, she has no interest in money or fancy things. Her real love is building and fixing machines, which she learned to do in her uncle's workshop. She would have been happy tinkering away for the rest of her life, had Kaos not carried out an uncle-napping when no one was looking. Determined to rescue her mentor, Sprocket built herself a high-tech battle suit, grabbed the biggest wrench she could find, and set off to crack some heads. Although equipped with all sorts of gadgets and weapons, Sprocket has never managed to find her uncle. She'll never give up trying though, and whenever the forces of Darkness try to get in her way, they always end up regretting it. Smart, sassy and heavily armed, Sprocket is on a mission to fix evil once and for all.

Sprocket met with Master Eon in the Eternal Archives to see if Squirmgrub had found the location to the next fragment to the Mask of Power. However when they didn't see Squirmgrub in sight, they discovered that the Warrior Librarian hadn't reported that the Earth segment to the Mask of Power was found. Master Eon sent Sprocket to assist the Skylanders already at the Fantastic Fairy Fair where the segment to the Mask of Power currently was.

trivia: A sprocket is a wheel with teeth, similar to a gear, which meshes with others of its kind through chains or tracks (like those on a bicycle).
If Sprocket sets up a turret near Octavius in The Oracle, it will fire at him.

In the alpha version of Skylanders: Giants, Sprocket went by the placeholder names of Engineer and Spark. She originally appeared as an elf instead of a Goldling, and therefore had green skin, pointed ears, and pupilless white eyes.
Activision ordered her original catchphrase 'Fear the gear!' to be cut, as it sounded too much like Fright Rider's catchphrase.
Sprocket is voiced by E.G. Daily, best known for the voice of Buttercup in The Powerpuff Girls and Tommy Pickles in Rugrats.
She and Chill are the only Skylanders so far who don't have any basic upgrades for their primary attacks.
Her Monkey Wrench upgrade adds +6 to damage in Swap Force.
In her first artwork, Sprocket wore green goggles. But in both Giants and Swap Force, her goggles are black.
Sprocket is one of the few Skylanders to use a vehicle for an attack.
She is the first female Tech Skylander in the series.
She, Fright Rider and Hot Dog are the only Giants-debut core Skylanders without any LightCore counterparts.

trailers.name: Skylanders Giants - Meet the Skylanders - Sprocket (The Fix Is In)
Skylanders Giants - Sprocket's Soul Gem Preview (The Fix is In)
Meet the Skylanders Heavy Duty Sprocket

gameplay: Sprocket uses both brains and brawn in battle. She can smack foes with her large wrench and build machine gun turrets very quickly that lock on to enemies automatically and shoot them. She can also deploy special mines that bounce in the air before exploding when enemies are near. Sprocket can even hop into her turrets which becomes a battle tank, where she can shoot enemies. In Terrafin battles the Boom Brothers, it is shown that she has a laser cutter in her battle suit which can easily cut through metal. Her skills in technology are far greater, as she was able to repair the escape pod on Trash Mountain very quickly.

basic.name: Wrench Whack
basic.content: Press the Attack 1 button to swing the big wrench.

basic.name: Turret Gun-O-Matic
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to build a turret that shoots enemies. Climb inside by facing the turret and pressing Attack 2.

basic_upgrades.name: Auto Turret V2
basic_upgrades.content: Turret Gun-o-Matic does increased damage and has more HP.

basic_upgrades.name: Bouncing Betty Mines
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to toss mines that explode when enemies are near.

basic_upgrades.name: 2 Times The Turrets
basic_upgrades.content: Can have 2 active turrets at once.

basic_upgrades.name: Tanks A Lot!
basic_upgrades.content: When climbing inside a turret, it transforms into a drivable assault tank.

soulgems.name: Landmine Golf
soulgems.content: Facing a mine, press Attack 1 to send it flying towards enemies.

wow_pows.name: Tanks for the New Toy
wow_pows.content: While driving a tank, hold Attack 2 to fire a Tesla Cannon. Turrets and Tank do increased damage.

abilities.name: Sprocket Combos
abilities.content: Press Attack 1, Hold Attack 2 for Power Surge. Press Attack 1, Attack 1, Hold Attack 3 for Mines O' Plenty

abilities.name: All Mines
abilities.content: Sprocket can now deploy three Bouncing Betty mines at once.

abilities.name: Mine Drop!
abilities.content: While driving a tank, press Attack 3 to drop mines out of the back.

abilities.name: Exploding Shells
abilities.content: Turret and Tank shells now explode on contact, doing extra damage.

abilities.name: Self Destruct System
abilities.content: When a Turret or Tank expires, it detonates and damages anything nearby.
